findings.message: Client now sends query parameter 'include_location=true' but the committed consumer pact (test_consumer_inventory.py:17) specifies GET /inventory/1 without query parameters. The Pact mock server will not match this request during contract testing.
findings.suggestion: Either remove the query parameter from the client request, or update the consumer pact test (test_consumer_inventory.py) to include the query parameter in the expected request and regenerate/publish the pact.

findings.message: Client now accesses 'location' field from the response, but the committed consumer pact (test_consumer_inventory.py:19) does not include 'location' in the expected response body. The pact must be updated to reflect this new response field before contract testing will pass.
findings.suggestion: Update the consumer pact test to include the 'location' field in the expected response (e.g., 'location': match.string(...)), then regenerate and publish the pact to reflect this contract change.
